title: Crash On Death
description: Wanna add some steaks to your world? Well now you can, this mod will make Minecraft spontaneously combust when you die and instantly closes!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d94682523627caba4a885dc63604aea1df5632e.png)

![The mod crashed my game!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QgFhmbMr/images/4067ce9f9bb19a2259890c7790e71562a20a29a1.gif) **Dont use server unless you want it to crash as soon as you start the server!**
Nerd stuff 🤓 Crashes your game by using one line of code! ``` MemoryUtil.memSet(0, 0, 1L); ``` Steal it if you want I dont care.
Features - Die = crash - On die, crash game - When you death it crashes
This was an idea by a friend of mine
